title: Greeting
content: Hi! This is {agent_name}, your support assistant for today. How can I help you?

title: AI Escalation
content: Thank you for reaching out. I've reviewed your conversation with our AI assistant and I'm here to help resolve your issue. Could you please provide more details?

title: Checking Account
content: I understand you're experiencing issues. Let me check your account details and get back to you shortly.

title: Payment Investigation
content: I understand you're experiencing payment issues. Let me investigate this for you. Could you please confirm the payment date and amount?

title: Technical Support
content: I'm sorry to hear you're experiencing technical difficulties. Let me help you troubleshoot this. Could you please describe what you see on your screen?

title: Closing
content: Is there anything else I can help you with today? If not, I'll close this ticket. Feel free to reach out anytime you need assistance!

title: Follow Up
content: I'm following up on your previous inquiry. Has the issue been resolved? Please let me know if you need any further assistance.
